'''Heffrin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. This mountainous world was a small [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony maintained by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The planet held important ruins from a vanished civilization, including the [[Heffrin Aqueducts]], which spanned Heffrin's continents;<ref name="TEA" /> research during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] identified the Aqueducts' builders as early [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] explorers.<ref name="The Aqueducts of Haffrin">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|The Aqueducts of Haffrin}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' mistakenly refers to Heffrin as the similarly-named planet [[Haffrin]].
